Simple, transparent pricing.

The base subscription is $499/year — covers 4G connectivity, OTA updates through OS 2.2.3, the O Loop app, remote diagnostics, and expert support. OS 2.5, 2.6, and 2.7 are available as one-time add-ons, individually or as bundles.

$499 / year
+ applicable Tax/VAT · Non-refundable
❓ Common questions

You had questions.

What is Ocean Loop?
Ocean Loop is the direct-to-consumer service launched by OV Loop to support Fisker Ocean owners in North America and Europe. It provides cloud connectivity, mobile network access, OTA software updates, remote diagnostics, and future feature upgrades — ensuring your vehicle keeps improving even after Fisker Inc.'s closure.
Who is OV Loop?
OV Loop is a software provider hired by American Lease and the Fisker bankruptcy trustee to manage and maintain the connected cloud infrastructure for Fisker Ocean vehicles.
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes. Your vehicle keeps all installed updates, but you'll lose cloud access, support, and eligibility for future OTA updates.
See all FAQs →
💬 From Ocean owners

What our members are saying.

When OTA updates began, the OVLoop team were proactive — they reached out throughout the process and even called me personally at the start of the 2.5 deployment. Early adopters being recognised with reduced pricing for 2.7 shows the team values the community that supported them from the start.
G
Gabriel
Fisker Ocean · United Kingdom
★★★★★
The OS 2.5 and 2.6 updates have been game-changers — torque vectoring, range reset, and finally CarPlay and Android Auto have completely refreshed the driving experience. The peace of mind from remote diagnostics and a team of former Fisker engineers is invaluable. I feel more confident than ever in my Ocean's future.
MW
Morris W.
Fisker Ocean · United States
★★★★★
Right away, 4G and driver profiles were activated and my car updated to the latest software. Then 2.5 made it noticeably more stable, and 2.6 made it feel complete again — CarPlay, Android Auto, and AI Box support. I'm extremely happy with my Ocean and very glad I decided to work with OVLoop.
JT
Jeffrey T.
Fisker Ocean Extreme · Netherlands
★★★★★
Part of what made me confident buying the Ocean was OV Loop's continued support. Hollywood Mode, remote lock/unlock, HVAC, Spotify — all still there. I couldn't imagine driving without torque vectoring now, and CarPlay is something I use every single day. Looking forward to 2.7 and beyond.
RF
Richard F.
Fisker Ocean · Indiana, US
★★★★★

🔄 OS Updates

Software Updates
for Your Ocean.

Every OS version we've shipped — what's in it, what it costs, and what comes next. Delivered over-the-air, no dealer visit required.

📡 Delivered Over-the-Air
🔢 Current latest: OS 2.7
📋 Sequential install required
⚠️ Note during updates: Your display may show an earlier OS version label during installation (e.g., OS 2.2.3 during a 2.5 update). This is a known visual bug and will be corrected once the update completes.
Latest Release

OS 2.7

Full landscape AI Box with CarPlay & Android Auto, VCU24 pre-charge conditioning for fast chargers, PKC 22 integration, touch bar climate controls, and smarter system performance.

$299
one-time + Tax/VAT

What's new

  • Full landscape mode for AI Box with CarPlay or Android Auto (requires OS 2.6 + owner-purchased AI Box; streams via phone hotspot)
  • VCU24 pre-charge conditioning for fast chargers
  • PKC 22 — optimized BLE connectivity, FOB responsiveness, and FOB battery life
  • Enable A/C Auto & Climate Control via touch bar
  • Automatic display brightness
  • HVAC persistence across drive cycles
  • Optimized Android Auto graphics for landscape
  • Seamless O Loop app 1.2 integration

Bug fixes

  • Intermittent OPD turning on unexpectedly
  • Intermittent Fisker cloud connectivity drops
  • Intermittent ambient light sync issues

Important notes

  • Requires OS 2.6 installed first
  • OTA delivery — no dealer visit required
  • AI Box landscape mode requires owner-purchased AI Box device
⚠️ Requires:OS 2.6📄 2.7 Release Notes
Available Now

OS 2.6

Android Auto & Apple CarPlay via hardware kit. Smartphone projection, phone mirroring, Voice AI, and deeper media integration.

$399
one-time + Tax/VAT

What's new

  • Smartphone projection (Android Auto & Apple CarPlay)
  • Phone mirroring and AI voice control
  • Autokit integration for Android and iOS
  • Improved fob response and remote power on
  • Hollywood Mode
  • Siri, Google Assistant, and Alexa support

Important notes

  • Requires USB hardware kit (included with purchase)
  • Must have OS 2.5 installed first
  • OTA delivery — no dealer visit required
  • Available in North America and Europe
⚠️ Requires:OS 2.5📄 2.6 Release Notes
Available Now

OS 2.5

Major infotainment, performance, and UI upgrades — delivered entirely over-the-air with no additional hardware.

$199
one-time + Tax/VAT

What's new

  • Dark/bright mode toggle
  • Torque vectoring and range reset
  • Ambient light sync and climate control refinements
  • Bluetooth/media improvements
  • Wi-Fi tethering support
  • Center Infotainment Display (CID) fixes

Important notes

  • No additional hardware required
  • Requires OS 2.2.3 first
  • Allow 2–3 business days after purchase for icon to appear
  • ~1 hour install with vehicle stationary
⚠️ Requires:OS 2.2.3📄 2.5 Release Notes

About Ocean Loop

What is Ocean Loop?
Ocean Loop is the direct-to-consumer service launched by OV Loop to support Fisker Ocean owners in North America and Europe. It provides cloud connectivity, mobile network access, over-the-air (OTA) software updates, remote diagnostics and repair software, and future feature upgrades — ensuring vehicles remain functional, secure, and continuously improving even after Fisker Inc.'s closure.
Who is OV Loop?
OV Loop is a software provider with deep expertise in digital payments infrastructure, automotive, digital wallets, and mobility network platforms. OV Loop was hired by American Lease and the Fisker bankruptcy trustee to manage and maintain the connected cloud infrastructure for Fisker Ocean vehicles.
What happened to Fisker Inc.?
Fisker Inc. is no longer operational. Fisker filed for bankruptcy in June 2024 due to financial difficulties, entering Chapter 7 bankruptcy leading to the liquidation of the company and its assets. Ocean Loop exists specifically to ensure Fisker Ocean owners continue to receive software support.
Is Ocean Loop officially sanctioned?
Yes. OV Loop was contracted by American Lease and the Fisker bankruptcy trustee to manage the connected cloud infrastructure for Fisker Ocean vehicles.

Subscription & Pricing

What's included in the base subscription?
The $499/year subscription includes: cloud connectivity, OTA updates through 2.2.3, remote diagnostics and fixes, the new secure O Loop mobile app, streaming/music access, GPS/time accuracy, PKC (Phone-as-a-Key) support, and phone/email customer support.
Will OS 2.5 and 2.6 be included in my base subscription?
No. OS 2.5 and 2.6 are optional add-ons priced separately — $199 and $399 respectively (one-time, plus applicable Tax/VAT). You can add them during signup or later from your profile under Plan → Edit options.
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes. Your vehicle keeps all installed updates after cancellation, but you'll lose cloud access, support, and eligibility for future OTA updates.
Will features be removed if I unsubscribe?
No. Updates already installed on your vehicle remain active. What you lose is cloud connectivity, the O Loop app access, remote diagnostics, support, and eligibility for future updates.
Will future updates cost extra?
Yes. Future OS versions beyond 2.6 will be optional add-ons priced separately from the base subscription. Pricing will always be communicated in advance.

OS Updates

What software version will I receive when I sign up?
You will receive software versions up to 2.2.3. After activation, OS 2.2.1 → 2.2.2 → 2.2.3 are delivered sequentially. T-Mobile and cloud connectivity setup takes 24–48 business hours, then the 2.2.3 OTA typically follows within 7–10 business days.
What's the difference between OS 2.5 and 2.6?
OS 2.5 delivers major infotainment, performance, and UI upgrades via OTA with no additional hardware. OS 2.6 builds on 2.5 by adding Apple CarPlay and Android Auto support, but requires a USB hardware kit and can only be installed via OTA. It introduces phone mirroring, voice assistant support, and deeper media integration.
Is there a 2.4 update?
No. You go directly from OS 2.2.3 to OS 2.5.
Do OS 2.5 and 2.6 apply to European vehicles?
Yes. The features and timeline for 2.5 and 2.6 apply to both North American and European vehicles.
Can I drive while the update is downloading?
Yes. Your Ocean is safe to drive while the update downloads in the background. However, once you initiate the installation, the vehicle cannot be driven. Allow approximately 1 hour for installation to complete while the vehicle remains stationary.
I paid for OS 2.5 — when will the icon appear?
Please allow 2–3 business days for the download/update icon to appear on your Ocean display after payment is confirmed. If you don't see it after 3 business days, contact our support team.
What if the OTA update fails?
You may be referred to a certified FAST partner for an in-shop update. Some vehicles may not support OTA updates due to hardware configurations — vehicle conditioning (healthy 12V battery, good connectivity) before the update is important.

The O Loop App

What does the O Loop app do?
The O Loop app provides secure remote unlock/start, OTA status monitoring, vehicle status, Phone-as-Key (PKC), battery and range status, cabin preconditioning, California Mode, and location tracking. It is included with your subscription.
Are third-party tools like OceanLink Pro supported?
No. Legacy third-party APIs have been disabled for security reasons. Only the official O Loop mobile app is supported for vehicle access and control.

Security & Data

Is my data secure?
Yes. OV Loop uses encrypted data channels and secured app protocols across all systems — from software updates and personal information to remote vehicle access.
Can I opt out of updates or roll back software?
You may request to delay certain non-critical updates. However, once an update is installed, it cannot be rolled back.

Activation Steps

Here's exactly what happens after you sign up — activation is predictable, just not instant.

1

T-Mobile & Cloud Connectivity Setup

We activate your Ocean's data line with T-Mobile. No action needed from you during this step.

⏱ 24–48 business hours
2

Over-the-Air Update to OS 2.2.3

Once your service is live, you'll receive an email invitation to opt in. After you confirm, your Ocean receives the update on a scheduled date.

⏱ 7–10 business days after Step 1
3

O Loop App Invite

After 2.2.3 is installed, you'll receive an email invite to join the O Loop app. Follow the in-app steps to connect your Ocean and enable Phone-as-Key.

⏱ After OS 2.2.3 is installed
💡 Tip: Keep an eye on your inbox (and spam folder) for your O Loop invite after the update completes.

App Troubleshooting

Most issues are resolved by reinstalling the latest version of the app.

⚡ Quick fix — works for most issues

1Uninstall the O Loop app.
2Reinstall the latest version (v1.1.0) from the App Store or Google Play.
3Open O Loop and sign in. If the password reset email doesn't work, use "Forgot password" directly in the app.
Password reset link doesn't work
Uninstall → reinstall v1.1.0 → use "Forgot password" directly in the app (don't use the email link).
App still shows "Link my EV" after pairing
Uninstall → reinstall v1.1.0 → sign in again.
Some commands don't run
Another app (like OceanLink Pro) may be connected to your Ocean. Force close both OceanLink Pro and O Loop, then open O Loop only.
Bluetooth (BLE) won't connect or is unstable
Try in order: (1) Force close and relaunch O Loop. (2) Confirm your Ocean is running OS 2.2.3. (3) Ensure Bluetooth is ON and O Loop has the right permissions (on Android: Location and Nearby devices). (4) Make sure no other app is connected via BLE to your Ocean. (5) Move away from clusters of other BLE devices before retrying.

FAST Certified Repair Partners

For issues that can't be resolved remotely, our certified FAST partners can perform in-person service on your Fisker Ocean.

Recalls & Reimbursements

OV Loop does not manage recall service or reimbursement processing. For these, please contact Fisker directly.
